title: Stockholm Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Stockholm with a Z-Score of -3.06. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stockholm are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's energy consumption. The Heating Degree Days (HDD) value is 11.7 GG, indicating a high demand for heating.
 The relative humidity is 52%, and the wind speed is 6.8 km/h, which will exacerbate the cold conditions. The Cold Snap is expected to continue, with no relief in sight.
 The city's infrastructure and services are likely to be strained, with potential disruptions to daily life.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
